info.title: Ex Libris APIs
info.description: For more information on how to use these APIs, including how to create an API key required for authentication, see [Alma REST APIs](https://developers.exlibrisgroup.com/alma/apis).

externalDocs.description: Detailed documentation on these APIs at the Ex Libris Developer Network.

get.description:
This web service returns Bib records in an XML format from a list of Bib IDs submitted in a parameter. 



Note: For an API that allows searching Bib records by various indexes see the [SRU](https://developers.exlibrisgroup.com/alma/integrations/sru/) protocol.



To include physical inventory information use expand=p_avail: 

AVA field is added per holding record (related to the input mms-id or to a related Bib records) as following: 

$$a - Institution code, $$b - Library code, $$c - Location display name, $$h - Campus, 

$$d - Call number, $$e - Availability (such as available, unavailable, or check_holdings), 

$$j - Location code, $$k - Call number type, $$f - total items, $$g - non available items, 

$$v - Calculated summary information, 

$$p - priority, $$0 - Bib record ID, $$8 - Holdings ID (of items on permanent location only), $$t - Holdings Information, $$q - library name.

 AVA is added also for items in temporary location. For such items, $$8 (holding id) will not be added.

Note: When using the API against a NZ Institution AVA fields will be retrieved for each member which has holdings.



To include digital inventory information use: expand=d_avail: 

MARC - AVD field is added per Representations, as following: 

$$a - Institution code, $$b - Representations ID, $$c - REPRESENTATION/REMOTE_REPRESENTATION, $$d - Repository Name, $$e - Label, $$f - Public Note, $$h - Full Text Link, $$r - IED. 

Dublin Core - A dc:identifier field with a delivery URL is added per representation.

MODS - A location/url field with a delivery URL is added per representation.



To include electronic inventory information use: expand=e_avail: 

AVE field is added per portfolio, as following: 

$$l -library code, $$m - Collection name, $$n - Public note, $$u - link to the bibliographic record's services page, 

$$s - coverage statement (as displayed in Primo's ViewIt mashup), $$t - Interface name. 

$$8 - portfolio pid, $$c - collection identifier for the electronic resource, $$e - activation status. 

$$i - Available for institution, $$d - Available for library, $$b - Available for campus. 

Note:  $$u will be created based on a Customer Parameter in the Customer Parameters mapping table (module: general): publishing_base_url.

Note: When using the API against a NZ Institution AVE fields will also be retrieved for each member which has portfolios, including $$a with the Institution code and $$0 with the mms-id.



Note: For Dublin Core records the expand parameter does not create an addition AVD field. Instead it creates a dc:identifier field with a delivery URL.

Note: For BIBFRAME, the expand parameters for inventory are not supported. See [SRU](https://developers.exlibrisgroup.com/alma/integrations/sru/) instead.

Note:The bibliographic record retrieved from Alma is enriched with additional identifiers. 

The MMS ID of the Network Zone and the Alma Community Zone ID are added to the record 

in additional 035 marc fields. The Community Zone ID is added with the prefix (EXLCZ) 

while the Network Zone ID is added with the prefix (EXLNZ-network_code). The local 

MMS ID is in the 001 marc field. These additional shared IDs can be used for better 

identification of a common record. The local MMS ID should be used when there is a need to call 

an API in the institution for the record.

parameters.name: mms_id
parameters.description: A list of Bib Record IDs (for example: 99939650000541,99939680000541) from 1 to the limit of 100

parameters.name: ie_id
parameters.description: IE identifier (IEP, IED etc.)

parameters.name: holdings_id
parameters.description: Holdings ID

parameters.name: representation_id
parameters.description: Representation ID

parameters.name: nz_mms_id
parameters.description: Network Zone ID

parameters.name: cz_mms_id
parameters.description: Community Zone ID

parameters.name: view
parameters.description: Use view=brief to retrieve without the full record.

parameters.name: expand
parameters.description:
This parameter allows for expanding the bibliographic record with additional information:

 p_avail - Expand physical inventory information.

 e_avail - Expand electronic inventory information.

 d_avail - Expand digital inventory information.

 requests - Expand total number of title requests.

 To use more than one, use a comma separator.

parameters.name: other_system_id
parameters.description: An Other System Id. An additional ID stored as part of the record's network numbers. Optional.

parameters.name: lod_uri
parameters.description: URI of the BIBFRAME record (work or instance)

200.description: OK - This method returns an object based on rest_bibs.xsd. See [here](/alma/apis/docs/xsd/rest_bibs.xsd)

400.description:
Bad Request

401652 - 'General Error - An error has occurred while processing the request.'

402203 - 'Input parameter mmsId list is not valid.'

post.description:
These web services create a new Bib record, and also allows creation of a local record for an NZ or a CZ record.

 Note: JSON is not supported for this API.

For more information regarding the various options supported for this API see [here](https://developers.exlibrisgroup.com/blog/cataloging-APIs-enhancements).

parameters.name: from_nz_mms_id
parameters.description: The MMS_ID of the Network-Zone record. Leave empty when creating a regular local record.

parameters.name: from_cz_mms_id
parameters.description: The MMS_ID of the Community-Zone record. Leave empty when creating a regular local record.

parameters.name: normalization
parameters.description: The id of the normalization process to run. Note: Add BIB to collection is not supported.

parameters.name: validate
parameters.description: Indicating whether to check for errors. Default: false.

parameters.name: override_warning
parameters.description: Indicating whether to ignore warnings. Default: true (record will be saved and the warnings will be added to the API output).

parameters.name: check_match
parameters.description: Indicating whether to check for a match. Default: false (record will be saved despite possible match).

parameters.name: import_profile
parameters.description: The id of the Import Profile to use when processing the input bibliographic record. Note that only the profile configuration affecting BIBLIOGRAPHIC record creation will be applied, and according to this configuration, the API can update an existing record in some cases.

requestBody.description: This method takes a Bib object. When creating linked record send an empty Bib object: <bib/> See [here](/alma/apis/docs/xsd/rest_bib.xsd?tags=POST)

application/xml.example:
<bib>
    <record>
        <leader>00260nam a2200109 u 4500</leader>
        <controlfield tag="001">991122700000121</controlfield>
        <controlfield tag="005">20140120122820.0</controlfield>
        <controlfield tag="008">131105s2013 xx r 000 0 gsw d</controlfield>
        <datafield ind1="1" ind2=" " tag="100">
            <subfield code="a">Smith, John</subfield>
        </datafield>
        <datafield ind1="1" ind2="0" tag="245">
            <subfield code="a">Book of books</subfield>
        </datafield>
    </record>
</bib>

200.description: OK - This method returns an object based on rest_bib.xsd. See [here](/alma/apis/docs/xsd/rest_bib.xsd)

400.description:
Bad Request

401652 - 'General Error - An error has occurred while processing the request.'

402209 - 'Given bib xml is invalid.'

402204 - 'Input parameters mmsId X is not numeric.'

402210 - 'Failed to create new bib.'

33007 - 'No record found for MMS id X'

60105 - 'JSON is not supported for this API.'

4022030 - 'Invalid normalization profile ID.'

4022031 - 'Failed to normalize record.'

4022032 - 'The record failed validation (with specified error).'

4022033 - 'Failed validation on the record.'

4022040 - 'Cataloging level is not enabled for your institution.'

60307 - 'The given bib object has matching records.'

10106 - 'Matching work record not found.'

10114 - 'Mandatory field Instance of is missing'

get.description: This web service returns a list of Authority records.

parameters.name: originating_system
parameters.description: The originating system. System in which the record was initially generated. Optional. But one of the three parameters is required.

parameters.name: originating_system_id
parameters.description: The originating system ID. The ID of the record in the original system. Optional. But originating system is required if this is present.

parameters.name: other_system_id
parameters.description: The other system ID. An additional ID stored as part of the record's network numbers. Optional.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Limits the number of results. Optional. Valid values are 0-100. Default value: 10.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Offset of the results returned. Optional. Default value: 0, which means that the first results will be returned.

parameters.name: view
parameters.description: Use view=brief to retrieve without the MARCXML.

200.description: OK - This method returns an object based on rest_authorities.xsd. See [here](/alma/apis/docs/xsd/rest_authorities.xsd)

400.description:
Bad Request

60292 - 'One of the system parameters is required.'

60293 - 'The originating system was supplied without the system ID.'

post.description:
This web service creates a new Authority record.

 Note: JSON is not supported for this API.

For more information regarding the various options supported for this API see [here](https://developers.exlibrisgroup.com/blog/cataloging-APIs-enhancements).

parameters.name: normalization
parameters.description: The id of the normalization process to run.

parameters.name: validate
parameters.description: Boolean flag for indicating whether to validate the record. Default is: false.

parameters.name: override_warning
parameters.description: Override the warning(s). Ignored if validate=false. Default is: true

parameters.name: check_match
parameters.description: Indicating whether to check for a match. Default: false (record will be saved despite possible match).

parameters.name: import_profile
parameters.description: The id of the Import Profile to use when processing the input record. Note that according to the profile configuration, the API can update an existing record in some cases.

requestBody.description: This method takes a Authority object. See [here](/alma/apis/docs/xsd/rest_authority.xsd?tags=POST)

application/xml.example:
<authority>
  <vocabulary>LCNAMES</vocabulary>
  <record>
                <leader>00550Cz a2200205n 4500</leader>
                <controlfield tag="005">20071017085956.0</controlfield>
                <controlfield tag="008">960329n] acaaaaaa] ]a aaa ]]]</controlfield>
                <controlfield tag="001">9825225680001421</controlfield>
                <datafield ind1=" " ind2="0" tag="130">
                        <subfield code="a">CarverGuide</subfield>
                </datafield>
                <datafield ind1="1" ind2=" " tag="400">
                        <subfield code="a">Carver, John2.</subfield>
                        <subfield code="t">CarverGuide</subfield>
                </datafield>
                <datafield ind1=" " ind2="0" tag="430">
                        <subfield code="a">CarverGuide series on effective board governance</subfield>
                </datafield>
                <datafield ind1=" " ind2="0" tag="430">
                        <subfield code="a">Carver guide</subfield>
                </datafield>
  </record>
</authority>

200.description: OK - This method returns an object based on rest_authority.xsd. See [here](/alma/apis/docs/xsd/rest_authority.xsd)

400.description:
Bad Request

402209 - 'Given Authority xml is invalid.'

60105 - 'JSON is not supported for this API.'

4022030 - 'Invalid normalization profile ID.'

4022031 - 'Failed to normalize record.'

60264 - 'Record format is not valid.'

402214 - 'Authority save failed from missing data.'

60265 - 'Authority creation failed.'

60266 - 'Vocabulary code is not valid.'

60294 - 'The authority record creation has failed with warnings.'

60295 - 'The authority record element is not in the payload.'

60341 - 'The import profile is not correct for authority.'

60342 - 'The converted authority element is not valid.'

delete.description:
This web service deletes an Authority Record.

For more information regarding the various options supported for this API see [here](https://developers.exlibrisgroup.com/blog/cataloging-APIs-enhancements).

parameters.name: authority_record_id
parameters.description: The Authority Record ID.

parameters.name: override
parameters.description: Override the warnings and delete the Authority Record. Optional.  The default is to not override (false).

parameters.name: cataloger_level
parameters.description: Cataloger level of the user deleting the record.

400.description:
Bad Request

402203 - 'An error has occured while validating the mms_id.'

401873 - 'Input parameter mms_id or parameter override is not valid.'

4022020 - 'Delete Authority error.'

40166454 - 'Delete Authority error. Community Zone Authority cannot be deleted.'

4022040 - 'Cataloging level is not enabled for your institution.'

60303 - 'Cannot delete this record due to insufficient cataloger level privileges.'

put.description:
This web service updates an Authority Record.

 Note: JSON is not supported.

For more information regarding the various options supported for this API see [here](https://developers.exlibrisgroup.com/blog/cataloging-APIs-enhancements).

See [Working with APIs in a Network Topology](https://developers.exlibrisgroup.com/blog/Working-with-APIs-in-a-Network-Topology) for more details.

parameters.name: authority_record_id
parameters.description: The Authority Record ID.

parameters.name: normalization
parameters.description: The id of the normalization process to run.

parameters.name: validate
parameters.description: Boolean flag for indicating whether to validate the record. Default is: false.

parameters.name: override_warning
parameters.description: Override the warning(s). Ignored if validate=false. Default is: true

parameters.name: override_lock
parameters.description: Override the record lock. Default is: true (record will be saved regardless if is currently being edited by another user).

parameters.name: stale_version_check
parameters.description: Check for record identical to one in the database. Default is: false (When true, the 005 field of the MARC record must be identical to that of the record in the database.)

parameters.name: cataloger_level
parameters.description: Catalog level of the user updating the record - used for validating that the level is sufficient. To change the record's level, use the payload's cataloging_level field.

parameters.name: check_match
parameters.description: Indicating whether to check for a match. Default: false (record will be saved despite possible match).

requestBody.description: This method takes an Authority object. See [here](/alma/apis/docs/xsd/rest_authority.xsd?tags=PUT)

application/xml.example:
<authority>
  <vocabulary>LCNAMES</vocabulary>
  <record>
                <leader>00550Cz a2200205n 4500</leader>
                <controlfield tag="005">20071017085956.0</controlfield>
                <controlfield tag="008">960329n] acaaaaaa] ]a aaa ]]]</controlfield>
                <controlfield tag="001">9825225680001421</controlfield>
                <datafield ind1=" " ind2="0" tag="130">
                        <subfield code="a">CarverGuide</subfield>
                </datafield>
                <datafield ind1="1" ind2=" " tag="400">
                        <subfield code="a">Carver, John2.</subfield>
                        <subfield code="t">CarverGuide</subfield>
                </datafield>
                <datafield ind1=" " ind2="0" tag="430">
                        <subfield code="a">CarverGuide series on effective board governance</subfield>
                </datafield>
                <datafield ind1=" " ind2="0" tag="430">
                        <subfield code="a">Carver guide</subfield>
                </datafield>
  </record>
</authority>

200.description: OK - This method returns an object based on rest_authority.xsd. See [here](/alma/apis/docs/xsd/rest_authority.xsd)

400.description:
Bad Request

401652 - 'General Error - An error has occurred while processing the request.'

402203 - 'Input parameters mmsId X is not valid.'

60105 - 'JSON is not supported for this API.'

4022030 - 'Invalid normalization profile ID.'

4022031 - 'Failed to normalize record.'

4022032 - 'The record failed validation (with specified error).'

4022033 - 'The record could not be validated.'

60294 - 'The authority record update has failed with warnings.'

60295 - 'The authority record element is not in the payload.'

4022034 - 'The authority record version is stale.'

60265 - 'Authority update failed.'

4022040 - 'Cataloging level is not enabled for your institution.'

4022041 - 'Cannot update this record due to insufficient cataloger level privileges.'

get.description: This Web service returns a list of collections.

parameters.name: level
parameters.description: The number of levels of sub-collections to retrieve. Optional. For example, 1 = only current; 2 = immediate decendants. Does not work with query. Default is 1.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Search query. Optional.  Does not work with levels parameter. Searching for text in library, collection name, external system or external ID. Multiple search terms may be combined with AND only.  For example q=external_system~x%20AND%20external_id~y.

200.description: OK - This method returns an object based on rest_collections.xsd. See [here](/alma/apis/docs/xsd/rest_collections.xsd)

400.description:
Bad Request

60106 - 'Invalid query format.'

402469 - 'The library query was not valid.'

post.description: This Web service creates a collection.

parameters.name: record_format
parameters.description: The record format which may be marc21, unimarc, kormarc, cnmarc, dc, dcap01, dcap02, or etd.

requestBody.description: This method takes a Collection object. See [here](/alma/apis/docs/xsd/rest_collection.xsd?tags=POST)

200.description: OK - This method returns an object based on rest_collection.xsd. See [here](/alma/apis/docs/xsd/rest_collection.xsd)

400.description:
Bad Request

402215 - 'An input parameter was not valid.'

402472 - 'The collection Name must be provided.'

402471 - 'The collection Name is a duplicate of another collection Name.'

402469 - 'The Library of the collection was not found.'

402550 - 'The Parent Pid of the collection was not found.'

402551 - 'The collection creation failed.'

702266 - 'Collection order must be greater than or equal to 0.'

put.description:
This web service updates a Bib Record.

 Note: JSON is not supported, and updating a linked CZ record is currently not supported.

For more information regarding the various options supported for this API see [here](https://developers.exlibrisgroup.com/blog/cataloging-APIs-enhancements).

For an IZ record that is linked to NZ record, local fields will be replaced - based on $$9local field indication.

Updating of non-local fields should be done directly on the NZ record.

See [Working with APIs in a Network Topology](https://developers.exlibrisgroup.com/blog/Working-with-APIs-in-a-Network-Topology) for more details.

parameters.name: mms_id
parameters.description: The Bib Record ID.

parameters.name: normalization
parameters.description: The id of the normalization process to run.

parameters.name: validate
parameters.description: Indicating whether to check for errors. Default: false.

parameters.name: override_warning
parameters.description: Indicating whether to ignore warnings. Default: true (record will be saved and the warnings will be added to the API output).

parameters.name: override_lock
parameters.description: Indicating whether to ignore lock. Default: true (record will be saved regardless if is currently being edited by another user).

parameters.name: stale_version_check
parameters.description: Indicating whether to validate stale version of the record. When true, the 005 field of the MARC record must be identical to that of the record in the database. Default: false.

parameters.name: cataloger_level
parameters.description: Cataloger level of the user updating the record - used for validating that the level is sufficient. To change the record's level, use the payload's cataloging_level field.

parameters.name: check_match
parameters.description: Indicating whether to check for a match. Default: false (record will be saved despite possible match).

requestBody.description: This method takes a Bib object. See [here](/alma/apis/docs/xsd/rest_bib.xsd?tags=PUT)

<bib>
    <record>
        <leader>00260nam a2200109 u 4500</leader>
        <controlfield tag="001">991122800000121</controlfield>
        <controlfield tag="005">20140120122820.0</controlfield>
        <controlfield tag="008">131105s2013 xx r 000 0 gsw d</controlfield>
        <datafield ind1="1" ind2=" " tag="100">

        </datafield>
        <datafield ind1="1" ind2="0" tag="245">

get.description:

[info!Note: It is possible to retrieve all the items under a bib record using 'ALL' in the holding_id path parameter.]

parameters.name: mms_id
parameters.description: The Bib Record ID.

parameters.name: holding_id
parameters.description: The Holding Record ID. May be ALL to retrieve all holdings for a Bib.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Limits the number of results. Optional. Valid values are 0-100. Default value: 10.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Offset of the results returned. Optional. Default value: 0, which means that the first results will be returned.

parameters.name: expand
parameters.description: Parameter for enhancing result with additional information. Currently supported: due_date_policy, due_date

parameters.name: user_id
parameters.description: The id of the user for which the discovery information will be calculated.

parameters.description: The current library for the item.

parameters.name: current_location
parameters.description: The current location of the item.

parameters.description: Search from enum_a, enum_b, chron_i, chron_j, and description. (see [Brief Search](https://developers.exlibrisgroup.com/blog/How-we-re-building-APIs-at-Ex-Libris#BriefSearch))

parameters.name: order_by
parameters.description: The sort order. Ordering may be selected by chron_i, description, enum_a, enum_b, enum_c, library, location, temporary_location, receive_date or expected_receive_date. There is no default.

parameters.name: direction
parameters.description: The sort direction of desc (default) or asc.

parameters.name: create_date_from
parameters.description: Retrieve items with create date after this Date (YYYY-MM-DD). Optional.

parameters.name: create_date_to
parameters.description: Retrieve items with create date before this Date (YYYY-MM-DD). Optional.

parameters.name: modify_date_from
parameters.description: Retrieve items with modify date after this Date (YYYY-MM-DD). Optional.

parameters.name: modify_date_to
parameters.description: Retrieve items with modify date before this Date (YYYY-MM-DD). Optional.

parameters.name: receive_date_from
parameters.description: Retrieve items with receive date starting after this Date (YYYY-MM-DD). Optional.

parameters.name: receive_date_to
parameters.description: Retrieve items with receive date before this Date (YYYY-MM-DD). Optional.

parameters.name: expected_receive_date_from
parameters.description: Retrieve items with expected receive date starting after this Date (YYYY-MM-DD). Optional.

parameters.name: expected_receive_date_to
parameters.description: Retrieve items with expected receive date before this Date (YYYY-MM-DD). Optional.

parameters.description: Special view of an item object. Optional. Currently supported: label - adds fields relevant for label printing.

post.description: This web service allows to perform a Scan-in operation on an item.
